## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Storybook stories added/updated for any visual or behavioral change
- [ ] Code follows repo style (double quotes, no semicolons, 2-space indent)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (if user-facing)
